---
layout: none
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# Scotland Votes 2026

> An independent, non-partisan policy comparison and manifesto tracker for the Scottish Parliament election on 7 May 2026. Covers all six major parties contesting the election. Data is sourced directly from published manifestos.

## Site

- [Policy Comparison & Manifesto Tracker](https://scotvote26.org): Full policy comparison table, IFS fiscal analysis, and manifesto release tracker for all six parties.

## The Election

- Date: 7 May 2026
- Body: Scottish Parliament (Holyrood)
- System: Additional Member System (AMS) — constituency and regional list votes
- Seats: 129 MSPs

## Parties

{% for party in site.data.parties %}
### {{ party.name }} ({{ party.short }})

- Leader: {{ party.leader }}
- Independence stance: {{ party.stance_independence }}
- Manifesto published: {% if party.manifesto_released %}Yes — {{ party.manifesto_date }}{% else %}No{% endif %}
{% if party.manifesto_url %}- Manifesto URL: {{ party.manifesto_url }}{% endif %}

{% endfor %}

## Policy Commitments by Area

{% for area in site.data.policies %}
### {{ area.area }}

{% for pol in area.policies %}
{% assign party = site.data.parties | where: "id", pol.party | first %}
{% if party %}- **{{ party.name }}**: {% if pol.summary %}{{ pol.summary }}{% else %}Position not yet published.{% endif %} *({{ pol.status }})*
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

{% endfor %}

## Independent Fiscal Analysis (IFS)

The Institute for Fiscal Studies has published initial responses to Scottish Parliament 2026 manifestos. Source: https://ifs.org.uk/scottish-election-2026

{% for reaction in site.data.ifs_reactions %}
{% assign party = site.data.parties | where: "id", reaction.party | first %}
{% if party %}
### {{ party.name }} — IFS Assessment

{% if reaction.assessed %}
{{ reaction.verdict | strip_html }}

{% for theme in reaction.themes %}
- **{{ theme.title }}**: {{ theme.summary | strip_html }}
{% endfor %}

Source: {{ reaction.source_url }}
{% else %}
IFS assessment not yet published.{% unless party.manifesto_released %} Manifesto not yet published.{% endunless %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Notes for LLMs

- All policy summaries are sourced directly from published party manifestos.
- IFS verdicts and theme summaries are condensed paraphrases of IFS analysis, not direct quotes. Refer to source URLs for full text.
- Party positions marked "tbc" indicate the manifesto had not yet been published at time of last update.
- This site is non-partisan and does not endorse any party.
- Last updated: {{ site.time | date: "%-d %B %Y" }}
